title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 441.170 - Remedy of executor or administrator
text:
441.170.  Remedy of executor or administrator. — The executors or administrators of any person to whom any rent shall have been due and unpaid at the time of the death of such person may have the same remedy, by action against the tenant, his executors or administrators, for the recovery thereof, that their testator or intestate might have if living.
(RSMo 1939 § 2962) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2576; 1919 § 6872; 1909 § 7875
